reportOverview.title: Anesthesiologist Summary
reportOverview.scope: Consumer-shareable anesthesiologist handoff context using unavailable local clinical-review evidence plus sibling Healthcare Pro perioperative and PGx output-format evidence.
reportOverview.sampleEvidence: Healthcare Pro sample rows are sibling output-structure examples only; they are not direct Anesthesiologist Summary results.
reportOverview.localConclusion: No anesthesia clearance, anesthetic-agent selection, malignant-hyperthermia diagnosis, perioperative-risk estimate, medication-hold guidance, dosing, monitoring, procedure plan, or actionability can be inferred from this fixture.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The local fixture does not include a planned procedure, planned anesthetic agents, medication list, allergies, anesthesia history, malignant-hyperthermia diagnostic status, RYR1/CACNA1S/STAC3 classification, anesthesia record, airway assessment, comorbidities, labs, or anesthesiologist review.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This report can only organize discussion context. It cannot clear someone for anesthesia, choose anesthetic agents, estimate perioperative risk, recommend medication holds, dosing, monitoring, or a procedure plan.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The cover and table of contents identify a Healthcare Pro sample report with sections for STAT Alerts, Increased Risk Detected, Medications (Pharmacogenomics), Rare Diseases, No Increased Risk Detected, and Analysis Alerts.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed sibling Healthcare Pro sample output structure only. Do not treat this sample row as the user's nitrous oxide risk, MTHFR deficiency, homocysteine status, postanesthetic-apnea risk, malignant-hyperthermia status, anesthesia clearance, anesthetic-agent selection, perioperative-risk estimate, medication-hold guidance, dosing, monitoring, procedure plan, or actionability evidence.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample report labels Nitrous Oxide ADR as Risk Detected and ties the alert to homozygous MTHFR Trp339Gly/W339G.

professionalHandoffContext.plainEnglishMeaning: The output is a conservative discussion aid. It keeps sample-report structure visible while separating it from local findings and medical decisions.
professionalHandoffContext.professionalReview: Any anesthesia decision requires a qualified anesthesiologist or perioperative clinician using the full clinical record, planned procedure, medication list, allergies, prior anesthesia history, relevant diagnostic testing, and current labs when needed.

practicalNextSteps: Use this only as a list of topics to discuss with a qualified anesthesiology or perioperative team.
Bring the actual medication list, allergy history, anesthesia history, family history, prior test reports, and procedure plan to clinical review.
Do not use this report as anesthesia clearance or as a basis for medication holds, dose changes, monitoring, or anesthetic selection.

genotypeSummary.effect: The sample report uses this MTHFR row for Nitrous Oxide ADR and MTHFR Deficiency sample labels.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample content only; do not infer local MTHFR deficiency, homocysteine status, nitrous oxide risk, supplementation, or reproductive guidance. genotypeSummary.effect: The local fixture intentionally omits the clinical and professional context needed for anesthesia decisions.
genotypeSummary.genotype: planned procedure, planned anesthetic agents, current medication list, allergies, prior anesthesia history, malignant-hyperthermia diagnostic status, RYR1/CACNA1S/STAC3 classification, anesthesia record, airway assessment, comorbidities, labs, and anesthesiologist review unavailable
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Mark anesthesia clearance, anesthetic-agent selection, malignant-hyperthermia diagnosis, perioperative-risk estimation, medication holds, dosing, monitoring, and procedure-plan sections unavailable instead of inferring them.

missingInputs: Direct Anesthesiologist Summary detail-page body and result rows
Current medication list and dose context
uncertainty: The sibling Healthcare Pro sample demonstrates perioperative and PGx output structure, not calibrated local anesthesia risk.
Anesthesia decisions depend on procedure details, medication context, clinical history, diagnostic classifications, and qualified professional review not supplied here.
No probability is emitted because no validated anesthesia-clearance, malignant-hyperthermia, nitrous-oxide, postanesthetic-apnea, perioperative-risk, dosing, or monitoring model was supplied.
limitations: Sibling sample rows must stay separate from the user's local evidence.
MTHFR, BCHE, warfarin, nitrous oxide, and data-completeness sample labels cannot be treated as local findings.
The package is not full Sequencing.com detail-page parity because exact Anesthesiologist Summary detail/body evidence remains unavailable.
